site.title: Filip Lopatka — Web Developer
site.description: Freelance web developer from Veľké Kostoľany, Slovakia. Fast websites and e-shops for small and medium businesses. WordPress, Next.js, headless CMS.
services.lead: Prices are starting points — the final quote comes after a discovery call. All packages include design, build, deploy, and support.
services.finalCta.lead: Send a few sentences about your project — I'll reply within 24 hours.
blog.empty: Nothing here yet. Working on the first English notes — check back in a few days.
blog.lead: Short notes from daily development. Focus: WordPress performance, headless setups, AI tools, Core Web Vitals.
home.intro.lead: Web developer focused on performance, SEO and meaningful interfaces. WordPress, Next.js, React — from landing pages to large e-shops.
home.aboutTitle.after: . The kind that earn someone money.
home.aboutLead: I build websites that are fast, easy to find in Google, and simple to manage. No unnecessary extras — just what actually works and can be measured.
work.lead: Recent work for Slovak and Czech clients. Click any project for the full case study.
brief.lead: Five questions, three minutes. I'll reply within 24h with a call slot and a ballpark estimate.
